# vite-plugin-framer

This Vite plugin is automatically installed when creating a new Framer plugin with [`create-framer-plugin`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/create-framer-plugin). It provides the necessary configuration to develop and build Framer plugins.

## Features

- Starts a development server with HTTPS enabled.
- Sets the correct `browserslist` target for Framer compatibility.
- Displays a fallback UI when the plugin is opened outside of Framer.
- Inlines small assets during production builds to optimize loading.
- Copies the `framer.json` configuration to the build output.

## Usage

This plugin is intended for projects generated by `npx create-framer-plugin@latest`. It is automatically configured in `vite.config.js`.

### Example `vite.config.js`

```javascript
import { defineConfig } from "vite"
import framer from "vite-plugin-framer"

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [framer()],
})
```
